violations.text: (Apples) were not washed before being packaged and served. Raw fruits and vegetables must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024
The floors in walk in cooler have an accumulation of rust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024

The floors of the walk in cooler have an accumulation of rust and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
Observed lighting in the walk in freezer was out. Sufficient lightening must be available to employees to perform certain job functions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings throughout the shared storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2023
The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is leaking onto the floor. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023

The shared storage room floor and shelving have an accumulation of debris and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2023

The walls in the gym/cafeteria area and walk-in cooler floor are in poor repair. Inspector observed several holes in the walls (near exit doors, near gym/cafeteria entrance) and heavy rust/accumulation of water on walk-in cooler floor. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
